# py-ethclient

> A Python L2 development platform for building application-specific ZK rollups. Define your State Transition Function as a plain Python function — the framework handles sequencing, batching, Groth16 proving, and L1 verification. Built on a fully independent Ethereum L1 execution client with EVM, RLPx, eth/68, snap/1, full+snap sync, Engine API, L1↔L2 bridge, and Groth16 ZK toolkit — all in pure Python.

py-ethclient contains 19,789 lines of source code across 75 files with 802 tests covering all layers from RLP to ZK proving to L2 rollup.

## L2 Rollup Framework

- [Rollup Orchestrator](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/rollup.py): Main user-facing API — wraps STF, Sequencer, Prover, L1Backend into a single `Rollup` class
- [Types](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/types.py): L2Tx, L2TxType, L2State, STFResult, Batch, BatchReceipt
- [Interfaces](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/interfaces.py): 4 pluggable ABCs — StateTransitionFunction, DAProvider, L1Backend, ProofBackend
- [Sequencer](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/sequencer.py): Mempool with nonce tracking, STF execution with snapshot/rollback, auto-seal batch assembly
- [Prover](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/prover.py): Groth16ProofBackend — circuit build, proof generation, verification
- [L1 Backend](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/l1_backend.py): InMemoryL1Backend — verifier deployment and proof verification
- [State Store](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/state.py): Trie-based Merkle state root for arbitrary key-value state
- [DA Provider](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/da.py): LocalDAProvider — in-memory data availability with keccak256 commitments
- [Runtime](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/runtime.py): PythonRuntime — wraps any Python callable as a StateTransitionFunction
- [Submitter](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/submitter.py): BatchSubmitter — prove → submit → verify pipeline
- [L2 RPC API](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/rpc_api.py): 7 l2_* JSON-RPC methods
- [L2 CLI](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/l2/cli.py): ethclient l2 {init|start|prove|submit}

## ZK Toolkit

- [Circuit Builder](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/zk/circuit.py): R1CS circuit definition with Python operator overloading
- [Groth16 Prover](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/zk/groth16.py): Full pipeline — R1CS → QAP → trusted setup → proof generation → verification
- [EVM Verifier](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/zk/evm_verifier.py): Auto-generated EVM bytecode for on-chain Groth16 verification
- [snarkjs Compat](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/zk/snarkjs_compat.py): Import/export snarkjs JSON format
- [ZK Types](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/zk/types.py): G1Point, G2Point, Proof, VerificationKey

## L1↔L2 Bridge

- [CrossDomainMessenger](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/bridge/messenger.py): Optimism-style message relay with EVM execution on target domain
- [Relay Handlers](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/bridge/relay_handlers.py): EVM, Merkle proof, ZK proof, TinyDB, Direct state handlers
- [Bridge Environment](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/bridge/environment.py): L1+L2+Watcher convenience wrapper with factory methods
- [Bridge Watcher](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/bridge/watcher.py): Automated outbox drain, relay, force queue processing

## Core Modules

- [RLP Encoding](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/common/rlp.py): Recursive Length Prefix encoding/decoding
- [Types](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/common/types.py): Block, BlockHeader, Transaction, Account, Receipt
- [Merkle Patricia Trie](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/common/trie.py): Trie with proof generation/verification and range proofs
- [Crypto](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/common/crypto.py): Keccak-256, secp256k1 ECDSA, address derivation
- [Chain Config](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/common/config.py): Network configs, hardfork params, genesis handling

## EVM

- [EVM Core](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/vm/evm.py): Main execution loop, transaction execution, contract creation
- [Opcodes](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/vm/opcodes.py): 140+ opcode handlers
- [Precompiles](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/vm/precompiles.py): ecrecover, SHA-256, RIPEMD-160, modexp, BN128, BLAKE2f, KZG
- [Execution Hooks](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/vm/hooks.py): L2 extensibility hook system

## Storage

- [Store Interface](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/storage/store.py): Abstract storage interface
- [Memory Backend](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/storage/memory_backend.py): In-memory implementation
- [Disk Backend](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/storage/disk_backend.py): LMDB-backed persistent storage

## P2P Networking

- [RLPx Handshake](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/networking/rlpx/handshake.py): ECIES encrypted handshake (EIP-8)
- [RLPx Framing](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/networking/rlpx/framing.py): AES-256-CTR frame encryption
- [eth/68 Messages](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/networking/eth/messages.py): eth/68 wire protocol
- [snap/1 Messages](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/networking/snap/messages.py): snap/1 wire protocol (8 types)
- [Discovery v4](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/networking/discv4/discovery.py): UDP discovery with Kademlia routing
- [Full Sync](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/networking/sync/full_sync.py): Header/body download and block execution
- [Snap Sync](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/networking/sync/snap_sync.py): 4-phase state machine

## JSON-RPC & Engine API

- [RPC Server](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/rpc/server.py): FastAPI-based JSON-RPC 2.0 dispatcher
- [eth/net/web3 API](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/rpc/eth_api.py): 20+ RPC methods
- [Engine API](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/rpc/engine_api.py): V1/V2/V3 with JWT authentication
- [ZK API](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/rpc/zk_api.py): zk_verifyGroth16, zk_deployVerifier, zk_verifyOnChain

## Optional

- [README](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/README.md): Full documentation
- [Korean README](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/README_ko.md): Korean language documentation
- [Tutorial](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/tutorial.md): Step-by-step guides for ZK, bridge, and L2 rollup
- [CLI Entry Point](https://github.com/tokamak-network/py-ethclient/blob/main/ethclient/main.py): Command-line interface
